## Skill Name

What would you name this skill?

## Problem Statement

What complex task should this skill teach an AI agent to perform?

## Use Cases

Describe 2-3 concrete scenarios where this skill would be triggered:

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Workflow

What phases or steps should the skill follow?

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Output

What should the skill produce? (e.g., report, code, document, diagram)

## Reference Materials

Any existing documentation, articles, or tools that should inform this skill?

## Skill Architecture

- [ ] Follows the SKILL.md + references/ pattern
- [ ] Includes YAML frontmatter with trigger phrases
- [ ] Has at least one reference document
- [ ] Output is self-contained (no external deps required)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the skill request here.
